seo_title: AI-Porn Takedown: How Deepfakes Threaten Adult Content Creators'…
meta_description: Deepfake pornography is a form of non-consensual AI pornography created by altering existing photographs or videos using deepfake technology to modify the…
body_html:
Adult content creators are having their performances used without consent, sparking controversy over the use of deepfakes.

Non-consensual AI pornography created by altering existing photographs or videos using deepfake technology to modify the appearance of the participants. A form of revenge porn that involves the making and sharing of realistic videos featuring non-consenting individuals.

Consequences for Adult Content Creators

Threats to their rights and livelihoods due to the unauthorized use of their performances. Loss of control over their own content, leading to public humiliation or character assassination.

Many countries Criminalized the use of deepfake pornography through legislative measures and technological solutions.

Prevention and Takedown Technological solutions, such as AI-powered takedowns, are being explored to prevent the spread of deepfakes and protect adult content creators' rights.

source.title: The shock of seeing your body used in deepfake porn
source.summary: When Jennifer got a job doing research for a nonprofit in 2023, she ran her new professional headshot through a facial recognition program. She wanted to see if the tech would pull up the porn videos she’d made more than 10 years before, when she was in her early 20s. It did in fact return…
